creator: otacilio.neto@ee.ufcg.edu.br
text:
Steps to reproduce:

When I click on the write button, reply, Forward or on  Edit->preferences->Composition.

I have clicked 

Help-> Restart with Add-ons disabled... 

but Thunderbird stills crashing.


Actual results:

Thunderbird crashes


Expected results:

Not crashes


See also https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=816938

How-To-Repeat: 
When I click on the write button, reply, Forward or on  Edit->preferences->Composition.
